summary: Iteration 2 (RCare rebrand + admin/settings/reports/assistant). Backend: 19/19 pytest passed (14 new + 5 regression). Admin verify/change-password works with default '2255' and is RESTORED at end of suite. Settings GET/POST persists water_goal_ml + patient_name with validation (100–10000 ml, non-empty name). /inconsistencies returns {date, alerts[]}. /reports supports week/month/all/custom with insulin+food+water+insights{good,concerns}. /assistant returns weekly range (7 days) + insights. Insight generation verified by seeding glucose=250 and asserting it surfaces under concerns. Frontend (mobile 390x844): Home renders 'RCare' brand, OK/alerts card, 3 big action cards (INSULINA/ALIMENTAÇÃO/ÁGUA), 'Gerar relatório PDF' button, FAB Assistente, and admin icon. Admin icon → admin-login → senha 2255 → /admin painel (Estatísticas + Configurações). Reports and Stats screens both render 4 period chips (Semana / Este mês / Todo período / Personalizado) and the 'Gerar PDF'/summary cards render. Assistant screen shows 'Resumo da Semana' with good (Pontos positivos) and concerns (Pontos de atenção) sections.

issues: React Native Web console noise: deprecated shadow* props (use boxShadow), deprecated props.pointerEvents (use style.pointerEvents), invalid DOM transform-origin, unknown onResponder* handlers from react-native-chart-kit, TouchableMixin deprecated. Non-blocking.

action_items: Optional: replace shadow* styles with boxShadow and migrate pointerEvents prop to silence RN Web warnings.
Optional: spec in problem statement used labels 'Mês/Tudo', actual UI shows 'Este mês'/'Todo período'. Labels still semantically correct — no action required unless you want exact match.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py still clean (~495 lines) with _id excluded, Pydantic validation on admin/settings payloads, async mongo, env-only config.
/admin/change-password correctly validates old password (403) and min length (400); admin password stored in settings collection (not env) — correct.
index.tsx splash uses timers only (no animated API), but functionally hides after ~2.6s and exposes full home — acceptable for playwright testing.
All interactive elements have testID (home-*, admin-*, etc.).
seed_data_creation: TestReportsInsights seeds 1 TEST_rcare insulin record (glucose=250) on month-start date and deletes it in finally. Admin password changed to 9999 then restored to 2255 inside test_change_password_and_restore. Settings are captured and restored. No leftover test data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run: export EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=$(grep EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL /app/frontend/.env | cut -d= -f2); pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v. Admin password: 2255 (default). Period chip labels in UI: 'Semana' | 'Este mês' | 'Todo período' | 'Personalizado' (map to week/month/all/custom).
